title: Notification No.122/2015-Cus(NT), dated 24.11.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 122/2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 24th November, 2015 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Principal Commissioner/Commissioner of Customs, Nhava Sheva-I, Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on the following - (i) the Principal Commissioner/Commissioner of Customs, Nhava Sheva-I, Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva, Tal Uran, Dist. Raigad, Maharashtra-400707; (ii) the Principal Commissioner/Commissioner of Customs(IV), Air Cargo Complex-Export, Sahar, Andheri(East), Mumbai-400099, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Jindal Saw Ltd., Jindal Centre, 12, Bhikaji Cama Place, New Delhi-110066 issued vide Show Cause Notice number. DRI/AZU/CI/ENQ-22(INT-06/2015)/2015, dated the 9th April, 2015 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad. [F No.437/48 /2015-Cus.IV] (Z. R. Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
